metadata.name: Libya Knowledge Source Registry
metadata.notes: Official portals and trusted institutions. URLs are intended for retrieval-grounded QA.

sources.title: Central Bank of Libya (CBL)
sources.description: Exchange rates, monetary policy decisions, banking regulations, and official financial circulars.

sources.title: National Oil Corporation (NOC)
sources.description: Energy sector announcements, production updates, reports, tenders, and official statements.

sources.title: Libyan Investment Authority (LIA)
sources.description: Sovereign investment information, governance, public statements, and financial or policy disclosures.

sources.title: Government of National Unity (Prime Minister Office)
sources.description: Prime Minister office announcements, official communications, decisions, and cabinet-related updates.

sources.title: Hakoometna (Our Government)
sources.description: Government communications and public service information for citizens.

sources.title: Bureau of Statistics and Census
sources.description: National statistics, demographic indicators, economic metrics, and census-related publications.

sources.title: Audit Bureau of Libya
sources.description: Oversight reports, audits of public funds, accountability statements, and institutional publications.

sources.title: Ministry of Finance
sources.description: Public budgeting, fiscal policy, government expenditure, revenue management, and financial regulations.

sources.title: Ministry of Foreign Affairs
sources.description: Diplomatic relations, consular services, official statements, international agreements, and travel advisories.

sources.title: Ministry of Interior
sources.description: Internal security, policing and public safety services, civil protection, and administrative announcements.

sources.title: Ministry of Justice
sources.description: Justice sector administration, legal services, judicial coordination, regulations, and public notices.

sources.title: Ministry of Economy & Trade
sources.description: Trade policy, business regulations, investment facilitation, licensing guidance, and economic initiatives.

sources.title: Ministry of Higher Education & Scientific Research
sources.description: University governance, higher education policy, scholarships, accreditation, and research-sector announcements.

sources.title: Ministry of Education
sources.description: School education policy, curriculum guidance, academic calendars, examinations, and sector updates.

sources.title: Ministry of Technical & Vocational Education
sources.description: Technical and vocational training programs, institutes, certifications, and workforce skills development.

sources.title: Ministry of Health
sources.description: Public health policy, healthcare services, hospital system updates, guidelines, and health-sector announcements.

sources.title: Ministry of Labor & Rehabilitation
sources.description: Employment policy, labor regulations, job programs, training/rehabilitation services, and workforce initiatives.

sources.title: Ministry of Social Affairs
sources.description: Social welfare programs, family support services, protection initiatives, and related public guidance.

sources.title: Ministry of Planning
sources.description: National development plans, strategic projects, policy planning, and cross-sector coordination updates.

sources.title: Ministry of Transportation
sources.description: Transport policy, aviation/ports/roads administration, logistics regulations, and sector announcements.

sources.title: Ministry of Water Resources
sources.description: Water resource management, infrastructure oversight, supply policies, and water-sector planning updates.

sources.title: Ministry of Agriculture
sources.description: Agriculture policy, food production programs, farming support, livestock initiatives, and sector guidance.

sources.title: Ministry of Housing & Construction
sources.description: Housing policy, construction sector oversight, public projects, urban planning coordination, and tenders.

sources.title: Ministry of Culture & Knowledge Development
sources.description: Cultural policy, heritage initiatives, knowledge programs, events, and official cultural announcements.

sources.title: Ministry of Communications & Informatics
sources.description: Digital transformation strategy, ICT policy, e-government initiatives, and national communications programs.

sources.title: Ministry of Environment
sources.description: Environmental policy, climate and conservation initiatives, regulations, and environmental program updates.

sources.title: Ministry of Defense
sources.description: Defense administration announcements and institutional updates.

sources.title: Ministry of Awqaf & Islamic Affairs
sources.description: Religious affairs administration, waqf services, mosque management guidance, and official announcements.

sources.title: Ministry of Youth
sources.description: Youth programs, sports and engagement initiatives, community projects, and related announcements.

sources.title: Ministry of Local Government
sources.description: Municipal administration guidance, local governance policy, services coordination, and official updates.

sources.title: Ministry of Tourism
sources.description: Tourism policy, destination promotion, licensing guidance, and tourism-sector news and announcements.
